description_long: This is a six-armed chandelier-style sconce suspended from a chain, featuring six cylindrical lampshades arranged in a circular pattern. The central stem is composed of a series of stacked spherical and cylindrical elements, providing a balanced and symmetrical appearance. Each arm extends outward and slightly upward, supporting a lampshade with a subtle lip at the bottom edge. The fixture is predominantly a matte white or light gray color, giving it a clean and modern look. The chain and connecting hardware are robust, suggesting the fixture is designed to be mounted securely to a ceiling. The overall design is elegant and functional, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A six-armed chandelier sconce with cylindrical lampshades and a central stem, suspended by a chain in a matte white finish. The design is symmetrical and modern, ideal for ceiling mounting.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six lampshades evenly spaced around the central stem, with the chain and decorative spheres clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the central stem and the arrangement of the arms, with the chain attachment point more prominent.
description_view_2: Similar to the front view, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the lampshades and the central stem details.
description_view_3: Rear angled view, mirroring view 1, with a clear look at the back of the fixture and the attachment hardware.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a symmetrical arrangement. The use of cylindrical lampshades and a simple chain suspension gives it a contemporary yet timeless appeal.
